metadata.title: Domus Digital Solutions | Low-Code Development & AI
metadata.description: Agency specialized in low-code development, apps, internal systems and AI agents. We deliver in weeks what others take months.

metadata.ogDescription: Agency specialized in low-code development, apps, internal systems and AI agents. We deliver in weeks what others take months.

hero.headline: Digital Innovation at
hero.description: We accelerate your business transformation with tailor-made solutions, conversion-focused design and cutting-edge technology.

aiCard.prompt: Create a customer service agent for e-commerce
aiCard.response: Sure! I'll set up an agent with context memory, CRM integration and real-time responses...

services.sectionDescription: We develop robust solutions with conversion-focused design, using the best technologies on the market.

internalSystems.title: Internal Systems
internalSystems.description: Automate processes and centralize your company's management with custom ERPs and CRMs, built to scale alongside your business.

customApps.title: Custom Apps
customApps.description: Responsive mobile and web applications with intuitive interfaces and high performance to engage your users.

websites.title: High-Conversion Websites
websites.description: Ultra-fast landing pages and institutional websites, SEO-optimized and focused on turning visitors into customers.

aiAgents.title: Autonomous AI Agents
aiAgents.description: We build artificial intelligence agents capable of reasoning, making decisions and executing complex workflows autonomously and continuously.

about.headline: We were born to turn ideas into software that drives results.
about.p1: Domus was born out of frustration with projects that take too long, cost too much and deliver too little. We brought together specialists in low-code, AI and design to build a different kind of agency: focused on real speed, genuine quality and long-term partnerships.
about.p2: Today we serve companies of all sizes, from early-stage startups to corporations looking to modernize internal processes — always with the same commitment: deliver value fast and build solid foundations to scale.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: We deliver in weeks what the market takes months. No bureaucracy, no delays.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Every line of code and every design decision exists to serve one goal: your business results.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We're not just vendors — we're the tech team your company needs to grow.

whyChooseUs.description: We're not just coders. We combine the speed of modern platforms with clean-code architectures to deliver the software your business needs today, not next year.

speed.title: Extreme Speed
speed.description: We use modern frameworks and agile methodologies to accelerate your product's time-to-market without compromising quality.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Robust architectures with industry-leading security practices, ensuring the protection of your company's and customers' data.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: Systems built to grow. We lay solid foundations that handle increased traffic and data volume without bottlenecks.

uiux.title: Premium UI/UX
uiux.description: Stunning and intuitive interfaces focused on the user journey, maximizing retention and conversion rates.

portfolio.title: Success
portfolio.description: Real projects delivered for companies that trusted Domus to turn their challenges into digital solutions.

conect-frota.title: Conect Frota System
conect-frota.description: Web and mobile platform for managing independent drivers (TAC), controlling fines, vehicle taxes and mandatory fleet licensing.

monica-soltau.title: Mônica Soltau Portal
monica-soltau.description: Custom software and app for browsing and printing educational content aligned with BNCC, with user management by municipality, school and access profile.

sabbado.title: Sabbado Integrated Portal
sabbado.description: Integrated institutional portal with segmented navigation across the three fronts of Grupo Sabbado — Advisory, Consulting and Training in Public Procurement — under a single web address.

hk-midia.title: HK Mídia Platform
hk-midia.description: Web and mobile application for managing an education program: monitoring families, students and schools, with integrated communication between students, families, teachers and health professionals.

escola-tem-voz.title: My School Has a Voice
escola-tem-voz.description: Web application with multi-language support, configurable forms, reminder sending, access profiles for the Department of Education, usage metrics and an analytical dashboard.

items.question: What is the average delivery timeline?
items.answer: Our focus is speed without sacrificing quality. Landing pages and institutional websites average 2 to 4 weeks. Internal systems and complex apps range from 6 to 12 weeks depending on scope.

items.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
items.answer: Absolutely! We believe in long-term partnerships. We offer maintenance and ongoing support packages to ensure your software keeps scaling and performing at its best.

items.question: How does low-code development work?
items.answer: We use modern platforms that accelerate the creation of interfaces and business logic, combined with custom code (Next.js, Node.js) where performance and uniqueness are critical. It's the best of both worlds.

items.question: Are AI agents safe for my company's data?
items.answer: Absolutely. We implement AI architectures with data isolation, ensuring your company's information is never used to train public models. Security and privacy are our top priorities.

contact.headline: Let's turn your idea into
contact.description: Whether it's a disruptive app or a custom AI agent, the first step is a strategic conversation. Pick an available slot and schedule a meeting with us.

cta.headline: Ready to scale your operation?
cta.description: Join the companies that have already accelerated their digital transformation with Domus. Schedule a free consultation and discover your business's potential.

footer.mission: Turning vision into digital reality. We specialize in creating high-performance software solutions and conversion-focused design.
